question: Is the percentage of internet users in China (A) higher than in Canada (D)?

options.A: Yes, China (A) has a higher percentage of internet users
options.B: No, Canada (D) has a higher percentage of internet users
options.C: They have the same percentage of internet users

explanation: China or Canada appears grey on the map, which represents missing data, not a true value. Since one of the regions has no data, we cannot reliably compare their values, even though the color scale may tempt viewers to do so.
